# holistics_user_attribute (Resource)

A Holistics user attribute (custom or system).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# String attribute — common for free-form metadata like department or team.
resource "holistics_user_attribute" "department" {
  name           = "department"
  attribute_type = "string"
  label          = "Department"
  description    = "User's department"
}

# Number attribute — useful for row-level filtering (e.g. show rows only for
# customers below the user's tier).
resource "holistics_user_attribute" "customer_tier" {
  name           = "customer_tier"
  attribute_type = "number"
  label          = "Customer Tier"
}

# Boolean attribute — flag-style permissions.
resource "holistics_user_attribute" "can_see_pii" {
  name           = "can_see_pii"
  attribute_type = "boolean"
  label          = "Can See PII"
  description    = "Whether the user is cleared to view personally-identifiable fields."
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `attribute_type` (String) Attribute data type (e.g. `string`, `number`, `boolean`).
- `label` (String) Display label.
- `name` (String) Internal name of the attribute.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Optional description.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) User attribute ID.
- `is_system_attribute` (Boolean) True for built-in system attributes.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Import a user attribute by its integer ID.
terraform import holistics_user_attribute.department 7
```
